data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for multi-counter/window support (A1-A99, B1-B99 for different service types) but did not provide any evidence confirming that this requirement is satisfied. The evidence provided in prior steps does not include any checks or validations related to multi-counter support, indicating a gap in the validation process. Specifically, there are no API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the functionality of multiple counters or windows as required.
gaps: No evidence of multi-counter/window support validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
